roa.docketEntryComment: DA'S OPPOSITION DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED
PD MOTION TO PICK UP CAD

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:PEOPLE STIPULATE THAT FOR THE PURPOSE OF THE PRELIMINARY HEARING, PRIOR ALLEGED ON COMPLAINT AS TO COUNT #3 IS TRUE/INVOFF:JOHNSON/WIT SWORN DA:OFFICER OCHOA;     /EXHMA:PEOPLE'S #1 - PHOTO OF MAP OF S,F,; PEOPLE'S #2 - PHOTO OF A FIREARM; DEFENSE #A - PHOTO OF LANDSCAPE SHOWING A PONTIAC SUV;  DEFENSE #B - PHOTO OF LANDSCAPE SHOWING ROADWAY;DEFENSE #C - PHOTO OF CONSTRUCTION SITE/X:DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO SUPPRESSEVIDENCE IS GRANTED/871D:1, 2 AND 3/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/OR/WEAP/WS/LDPX:08-05-19/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND STATUS OF 19008698/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEAIRNG AND MTS/LD:08-05-19/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 25/TRANS25:FORTHWITH FOR PRELIMINARY AND MTS/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO PICK UP CAD/DAWT/X:SUBPOENA RECORD (CAD) IS RELEASED TO DPD JACK LAMAR,/X:FUTURE DATE IS CONFIRMED,/
